description: In this episode, Anatoly speaks with George Harrap, co-founder of Step Finance, about his journey in the crypto space, starting from early Bitcoin mining to launching a crypto remittance company in Hong Kong. They discuss the evolution of the crypto ecosystem and the challenges faced in building decentralized finance solutions.
topic_summary: George Harrap shares his decade-long experience in crypto, detailing his early involvement with Bitcoin mining [t=31:65], founding a remittance company [t=79:39], and the creation of Step Finance to address gaps in the DeFi ecosystem [t=137:49].
